name: Gmail AI email manager
description: Fetches recent emails from Gmail inbox, uses Claude AI to triage and categorize each email (to-respond, FYI, notification, marketing), drafts response suggestions for action-required emails, and posts a structured digest to Slack.

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

gmailGetKey.description: Gmail connection key for getting email details

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the email digest

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to process

steps.name: List recent emails from Gmail inbox
Compile email data for AI analysis
Build Slack Block Kit email digest
